etymology.description: simplified form of рўҮҮ; semantic зөІ(зөІ) (sД«, "silk") + phonetic еҚқ(еҚқ) (kuГ ng)
etymology.interpretation: This character is a simplified/variant form of рўҮҮ, which originally combines зөІ(зөІ) (sД«, "silk") for its semantic component with еҚқ(еҚқ) (kuГ ng) as the phonetic element. The semantic component suggests it is related to silk or something involving thread, while the phonetic element indicates the sound.
etymology.simplification: As a variant or simplified form of рўҮҮ, the character рўҮ… traditionally compacts its original elements to create a form that may have been simpler to write or recognize.
